description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden bungalow set on a rectangular grassy plot. The structure features a gable roof with a metallic or concrete finish and a single chimney protruding from one side. The front facade has a central door, a small set of steps, and a single window to the right of the entrance. The sides and rear of the bungalow display multiple symmetrically arranged windows, with the rear wall being plain and windowless. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the foundation appears to be made of stone or concrete. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of modest residential dwellings.
description: A compact, single-story wooden bungalow with a gable roof, central front door, and symmetrically arranged windows, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central door, a small porch with steps, and a single window to the right of the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three evenly spaced windows and the gable end of the roof with a chimney visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with three symmetrically arranged windows and the roof's chimney placement clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain wooden wall with no windows and the gable end of the roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical side and rear windows, single front window
